scripts.dev: pnpm generate-tokens && concurrently -n v,c "pnpm run dev:vite" "pnpm run dev:convex"
scripts.dev:public: concurrently -n app,t "pnpm run dev" "pnpm run dev:tunnel"
scripts.build: pnpm generate-tokens && node scripts/render-logo-png.mjs && node scripts/render-og-default-png.mjs && vite build && cp instrument.server.mjs .output/server
scripts.build:cf: pnpm generate-tokens && node scripts/render-logo-png.mjs && node scripts/render-og-default-png.mjs && CF_PAGES=1 vite build
scripts.preview:cf: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -- pnpm run build:cf && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: pnpm build:cf && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.test:e2e: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e ../../.env.test -- pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e ../../.env.test -- pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/public-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/seo-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/auth-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/prediction-flow-smoke.spec.ts --project=public-chromium --project=auth-chromium --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:headed: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e ../../.env.test -- pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e ../../.env.test -- pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --ui
scripts.dev:signin:in-leagues: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/dev-signin.ts in-leagues
scripts.dev:signin:solo: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/dev-signin.ts solo
scripts.dev:signin:stale: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -- pnpm exec tsx scripts/dev-signin.ts stale
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:barrels && pnpm exec oxlint -c ../../.oxlintrc.json src server vite.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm exec oxlint -c ../../.oxlintrc.json src server vite.config.ts --fix
scripts.fix: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint
